name: How is **fault** determined if AI wrongly recommends a less qualified lawyer over mine?

mainEntity.name: How is **fault** determined if AI wrongly recommends a less qualified lawyer over mine?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**No fault liability; AI reflects available data patterns, not endorsements.** Platforms disclaim advice; users choose.[1] Firms control their signals.[3]

**Key factors:**
- Data consistency rules
- No AI malpractice
- User responsibility
- Strengthen your footprint

**Boost your recognitions to outrank others.** No legal recourse.[1] **Proactive signals prevail.**
